languages.original_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

languages.text: "Итак, к теме. Никогда не понимал почему данный вопрос выдается некоторыми мыслителями за глубокий, когда ответ на него весьма тривиален. Смысл жизни определяется положением человека в иерархии Империума и местом его дислокации, но так или иначе сводится к поддержке функционирования системы".

"So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."
languages.original_text: "Итак, к теме. Никогда не понимал почему данный вопрос выдается некоторыми мыслителями за глубокий, когда ответ на него весьма тривиален. Смысл жизни определяется положением человека в иерархии Империума и местом его дислокации, но так или иначе сводится к поддержке функционирования системы".

traits.locale_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

"So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

"So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

languages.text: «En cuanto al tema... Nunca he comprendido por qué algunos filósofos presentan esta pregunta como algo profundo, cuando la respuesta es perfectamente trivial. El sentido de la vida viene determinado por la posición de cada persona en la jerarquía del Imperium y el lugar al que se la envía. En esencia, consiste en apoyar el funcionamiento continuado del sistema».
languages.original_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

traits.locale_text: «En cuanto al tema... Nunca he comprendido por qué algunos filósofos presentan esta pregunta como algo profundo, cuando la respuesta es perfectamente trivial. El sentido de la vida viene determinado por la posición de cada persona en la jerarquía del Imperium y el lugar al que se la envía. En esencia, consiste en apoyar el funcionamiento continuado del sistema».

languages.text: “那么，言归正传。我始终不理解，为什么有些思想家把这个问题说得那么深奥，其实答案再简单不过。生命的意义，取决于一个人在帝国等级制度中的位置，以及被分配到什么岗位。但归根结底，就是要维持这个系统的运转。”
languages.original_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

traits.locale_text: “那么，言归正传。我始终不理解，为什么有些思想家把这个问题说得那么深奥，其实答案再简单不过。生命的意义，取决于一个人在帝国等级制度中的位置，以及被分配到什么岗位。但归根结底，就是要维持这个系统的运转。”

languages.text: « Pour en revenir à votre question... Je n'ai jamais compris la profondeur que lui accordent certains penseurs, alors que la réponse est somme toute banale. Le sens de la vie dépend de la position de chacun dans la hiérarchie de l'Imperium et de son lieu de déploiement. Mais ce qui compte par-dessus tout, c'est le soutien apporté au fonctionnement du système. »
languages.original_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

traits.locale_text: « Pour en revenir à votre question... Je n'ai jamais compris la profondeur que lui accordent certains penseurs, alors que la réponse est somme toute banale. Le sens de la vie dépend de la position de chacun dans la hiérarchie de l'Imperium et de son lieu de déploiement. Mais ce qui compte par-dessus tout, c'est le soutien apporté au fonctionnement du système. »

languages.text: "Gut, kommen wir zum Thema. Ich habe nie verstanden, warum einige Denker diese Frage für profund halten, wo die Antwort so trivial ist. Der Sinn des Lebens wird von der Position einer Person in der Hierarchie des Imperiums und dem Ort ihres Wirkens bestimmt. Aber letztlich geht es darum, das System am Laufen zu halten."
languages.original_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

traits.locale_text: "Gut, kommen wir zum Thema. Ich habe nie verstanden, warum einige Denker diese Frage für profund halten, wo die Antwort so trivial ist. Der Sinn des Lebens wird von der Position einer Person in der Hierarchie des Imperiums und dem Ort ihres Wirkens bestimmt. Aber letztlich geht es darum, das System am Laufen zu halten."

languages.text: 「さて、本題である。その答えはまったく些細なことなのに、なぜ一部の思想家がこの問いを深遠なものとして提示するのか、私には理解できない。人生の意味は、その人がインペリウムのヒエラルキーの中でどの位置にいるか、どこに配属されるかによって決まる。しかし、結局のところ、それはシステムの機能をサポートすることに行き着く。」
languages.original_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."

traits.locale_text: 「さて、本題である。その答えはまったく些細なことなのに、なぜ一部の思想家がこの問いを深遠なものとして提示するのか、私には理解できない。人生の意味は、その人がインペリウムのヒエラルキーの中でどの位置にいるか、どこに配属されるかによって決まる。しかし、結局のところ、それはシステムの機能をサポートすることに行き着く。」

languages.text: "Gelelim konuya. Cevabı son derece sıradan olan bu soruyu bazı düşünürlerin neden bu kadar derin bir şeymiş gibi sunduklarını hiçbir zaman anlayamadım. Hayatın anlamı, kişinin İmparatorluk hiyerarşisindeki konumu ve nereye konuşlandırıldığı tarafından belirlenir. Ancak nihayetinde iş, sistemin işleyişini desteklemeye gelir."
languages.original_text: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."
